assessor_1_raw: Anchor time cutoff prevents post-onset clinical actions from contaminating features. Clinician review of attention/SHAP provides additional validation. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Baseline feature augmentation with temporal indicators (time since last measurement, measurement frequency) is a correct approach to isolate missingness-handling from sequence modeling benefit. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: ICU vs floor stratification with balanced prevalence in each partition is correctly implemented. Different base rates are controlled for in the evaluation. Verdict: defense_wins.
